notes: Mira runs the Dragon Roost Inn. Warm, practical, keeps tabs on town gossip.

greeting.text: Welcome to the Dragon Roost, hunter. You look like you've just crawled out of the Ashfield. Can I help you?

responses.text: I need a room for the night.

sleep_offer.text: A bed and a hot meal — no coin needed for a guild hunter. Should I put the candle out?

responses.text: Not yet. I have things to do.

town_news.text: The guild's been busy. Word is something big has been stirring in the eastern reach of the Ashfield — bigger than your usual slimes. Aldric's posted new bounties if you haven't checked.

town_gossip.text: Old Gareth's been muttering about his hammer going missing. Thinks one of the wanderers took it. Between you and me, he probably just set it down somewhere and forgot.

farewell.text: Safe travels out there. The field doesn't forgive carelessness.
